text: I want to bring up the greatest player in the world, number two, two time, two time Finals MVP, world champion, a fun guy, and a man with a coactus waiting for him. I just want to say thank y'all for walking me here after the trade with Open Arms, man. It made my experience that much better. These group of guys let me do what I do on the floor. Coach Nick, let me do what I do. And now we got a championship. Thank you. And like they said, enjoy this, enjoy this moment, and have fun with it. Hot, hot, hot, hot. Yeah. What did you, baby? Kayla, back on the mic. MVP, MVP, MVP, MVP. Board man gets paid.
